quote: Best fusion food in F-6, hands down. Didn't expect the karahi and the steak to work on the same table, but they do.
The canopy alone is worth the visit. Then the food backs it up.
Attentive service without the hovering. The Manchurian was the standout of the night.
A great spot for a long catch-up over plates that cross continents without feeling confused.
Closed the meal with the shahi tukra — glad we saved room.
